016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.Constants.*;
025
026import java.io.*;
027import java.util.*;
028import java.util.function.*;
029
030import org.apache.jena.datatypes.xsd.*;
031import org.apache.jena.rdf.model.*;
032import org.apache.jena.riot.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
040import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
041
042/**
043 * Session for stream-based RDF serialization (binary formats like RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
044 *
045 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
046 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
047 * </ul>
048 *
049 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
050 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
051 * </ul>
052 */
053@SuppressWarnings({
054   "rawtypes",
055   "unchecked",
056   "resource",
057   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for serializer session hierarchy
058   "java:S115", // ARG_ prefix follows framework convention
059   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for RDF stream serialization
060   "java:S6541"  // Brain method acceptable for RDF stream serialization dispatch logic
061})
062public class RdfStreamSerializerSession extends OutputStreamSerializerSession {
063
064   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
065
066   /**
067    * Builder class.
068    */
069   public static class Builder extends OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
070
071      private RdfStreamSerializer ctx;
072
073      protected Builder(RdfStreamSerializer ctx) {
074         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
075         this.ctx = ctx;
076      }
077
078      @Override
079      public <T> Builder apply(Class<T> type, Consumer<T> apply) {
080         super.apply(type, apply);
081         return this;
082      }
083
084      @Override
085      public RdfStreamSerializerSession build() {
086         return new RdfStreamSerializerSession(this);
087      }
088
089      @Override
090      public Builder debug(Boolean value) {
091         super.debug(value);
092         return this;
093      }
094
095      @Override
096      public Builder javaMethod(java.lang.reflect.Method value) {
097         super.javaMethod(value);
098         return this;
099      }
100
101      @Override
102      public Builder locale(java.util.Locale value) {
103         super.locale(value);
104         return this;
105      }
106
107      @Override
108      public Builder mediaType(MediaType value) {
109         super.mediaType(value);
110         return this;
111      }
112
113      @Override
114      public Builder mediaTypeDefault(MediaType value) {
115         super.mediaTypeDefault(value);
116         return this;
117      }
118
119      @Override
120      public Builder properties(Map<String,Object> value) {
121         super.properties(value);
122         return this;
123      }
124
125      @Override
126      public Builder property(String key, Object value) {
127         super.property(key, value);
128         return this;
129      }
130
131      @Override
132      public Builder resolver(VarResolverSession value) {
133         super.resolver(value);
134         return this;
135      }
136
137      @Override
138      public Builder schema(HttpPartSchema value) {
139         super.schema(value);
140         return this;
141      }
142
143      @Override
144      public Builder schemaDefault(HttpPartSchema value) {
145         super.schemaDefault(value);
146         return this;
147      }
148
149      @Override
150      public Builder timeZone(java.util.TimeZone value) {
151         super.timeZone(value);
152         return this;
153      }
154
155      @Override
156      public Builder timeZoneDefault(java.util.TimeZone value) {
157         super.timeZoneDefault(value);
158         return this;
159      }
160
161      @Override
162      public Builder unmodifiable() {
163         super.unmodifiable();
164         return this;
165      }
166
167      @Override
168      public Builder uriContext(UriContext value) {
169         super.uriContext(value);
170         return this;
171      }
172   }
173
174   /**
175    * Creates a new builder for this session.
176    *
177    * @param ctx The serializer creating this session.
178    * @return A new builder.
179    */
180   public static Builder create(RdfStreamSerializer ctx) {
181      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
182   }
183
184   private final Model model;
185   private final Property pRoot;
186   private final Property pValue;
187   private final Lang lang;
188   private final RdfStreamSerializer ctx;
189   private final Namespace[] namespaces;
190
191   protected RdfStreamSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
192      super(builder);
193      ctx = builder.ctx;
194
195      model = ModelFactory.createDefaultModel();
196      namespaces = ctx.getNamespaces();
197      addModelPrefix(ctx.getJuneauNs());
198      addModelPrefix(ctx.getJuneauBpNs());
199      if (namespaces != null)
200         for (var ns : namespaces)
201            addModelPrefix(ns);
202      pRoot = model.createProperty(ctx.getJuneauNs().getUri(), RDF_juneauNs_ROOT);
203      pValue = model.createProperty(ctx.getJuneauNs().getUri(), RDF_juneauNs_VALUE);
204
205      var langName = ctx.getLanguage();
206      lang = toLang(langName);
207      if (lang == null)
208         throw new IllegalStateException("Unknown RDF language: " + langName);
209   }
210
211   @Override /* OutputStreamSerializerSession */
212   public boolean hasNativeBytes() {
213      // The RDF graph layer has no native byte-array literal type — byte[] is surfaced either as an
214      // xsd:base64Binary typed literal or as a plain string literal
215      // carrying the configured BinaryFormat's text wire form (at any other BinaryFormat, after the
216      // BinarySwap fires).
217      return false;
218   }
219
220   private static Lang toLang(String langName) {
221      var l = org.apache.jena.riot.RDFLanguages.nameToLang(langName);
222      if (l != null)
223         return l;
224      if ("RDF/PROTO".equals(langName)) // HTT - not registered in Jena's RDFLanguages
225         return Lang.RDFPROTO;
226      return null;
227   }
228
229   private void addModelPrefix(Namespace ns) {
230      model.setNsPrefix(ns.getName(), ns.getUri());
231   }
232
233   /**
234    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
235    *
236    * @param bpm The bean property to return the metadata on.
237    * @return The metadata.
238    */
239   protected RdfBeanPropertyMeta getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
240      return bpm == null ? RdfBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT : ctx.getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
241   }
242
243   /**
244    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
245    *
246    * @param bpm The bean property to return the metadata on.
247    * @return The metadata.
248    */
249   protected XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
250      return bpm == null ? XmlBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT : ctx.getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
251   }
252
253   private String encodeElementName(Object o) {
254      return XmlUtils.encodeElementName(toString(o));
255   }
256
257   private String encodeTextInvalidChars(Object o) {
258      if (o == null)
259         return null;
260      return XmlUtils.escapeText(toString(o));
261   }
262
263   private String getUri(Object uri, Object uri2) {
264      String s = null;
265      if (nn(uri))
266         s = uri.toString();
267      if (e(s) && nn(uri2))
268         s = uri2.toString();
269      if (s == null)
270         return null;
271      return getUriResolver().resolve(s);
272   }
273
274   @SuppressWarnings({
275      "null" // aType/wType intentionally null before assignment in control flow
276   })
277   private RDFNode serializeAnything(Object o, boolean isURI, ClassMeta<?> eType, String attrName, BeanPropertyMeta bpm, Resource parentResource) throws SerializeException {
278      var m = model;
279      ClassMeta<?> aType = push2(attrName, o, eType);
280      ClassMeta<?> wType = null;
281      ClassMeta<?> sType;
282
283      if (eType == null)
284         eType = object();
285      if (aType == null) {
286         o = null;
287         aType = object();
288      }
289      if (isOptional(aType)) {
290         o = getOptionalValue(o);
291         eType = getOptionalType(eType);
292         aType = getClassMetaForObject(o, object());
293      }
294      if (nn(o)) {
295         if (aType.isDelegate()) {
296            wType = aType;
297            aType = (ClassMeta)((Delegate)o).getBeanInfo();
298         }
299         sType = aType;
300         var swap = aType.getSwap(this);
301         if (nn(swap)) {
302            o = swap(swap, o);
303            sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
304            if (sType.isObject())
305               sType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
306         }
307      } else {
308         sType = eType.getSerializedClassMeta(this);
309      }
310
311      var typeName = getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, bpm);
312      RDFNode n = null;
313
314      if (o == null || sType.isChar() && ((Character)o).charValue() == 0) {
315         if (nn(bpm)) {
316            if (isKeepNullProperties())
317               n = m.createResource(RDF_NIL);
318         } else {
319            n = m.createResource(RDF_NIL);
320         }
321      } else if (sType.isUri() || isURI) {
322         // RDF URI gate must come before isBean/isMap/isCharSequence: @Uri-annotated values need Resource emission, not literal text.
323         var uri = getUri(o, null);
324         if (isAbsoluteUri(uri))
325            n = m.createResource(uri);
326         else
327            n = m.createLiteral(encodeTextInvalidChars(uri));
328      } else if (sType.isBean()) {
329         var bm = toBeanMap(o);
330         Object uri = null;
331         var rbm = ctx.getRdfBeanMeta(bm.getMeta());
332         if (rbm.hasBeanUri())
333            uri = rbm.getBeanUriProperty().get(bm, null);
334         var uri2 = getUri(uri, null);
335         n = m.createResource(uri2);
336         serializeBeanMap(bm, (Resource)n, typeName);
337      } else if (sType.isMap() || (nn(wType) && wType.isMap())) {
338         if (o instanceof BeanMap o2) {
339            Object uri = null;
340            var rbm = ctx.getRdfBeanMeta(o2.getMeta());
341            if (rbm.hasBeanUri())
342               uri = rbm.getBeanUriProperty().get(o2, null);
343            var uri2 = getUri(uri, null);
344            n = m.createResource(uri2);
345            serializeBeanMap(o2, (Resource)n, typeName);
346         } else {
347            n = m.createResource();
348            serializeMap((Map)o, (Resource)n, sType);
349         }
350      } else if (sType.isByteArray()) {
351         // byte[] gate must come before isCollectionOrArray: byte[] satisfies isArray() but RDF emits it as a typed base64 literal, not as a Seq of bytes.
352         var b64 = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString((byte[]) o);
353         n = m.createTypedLiteral(b64, XSDDatatype.XSDbase64Binary);
354      } else if (sType.isCollectionOrArray() || (nn(wType) && wType.isCollection())) {
355         var c = sort(sType.isCollection() ? (Collection)o : toList(sType.inner(), o));
356         var f = ctx.getCollectionFormat();
357         var cRdf = ctx.getRdfClassMeta(sType);
358         var bpRdf = getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
359         if (cRdf.getCollectionFormat() != RdfCollectionFormat.DEFAULT)
360            f = cRdf.getCollectionFormat();
361         if (bpRdf.getCollectionFormat() != RdfCollectionFormat.DEFAULT)
362            f = bpRdf.getCollectionFormat();
363         if (f == RdfCollectionFormat.MULTI_VALUED) {
364            serializeToMultiProperties(c, eType, bpm, attrName, parentResource);
365         } else {
366            n = switch (f) {
367               case BAG -> serializeToContainer(c, eType, m.createBag());
368               case LIST -> serializeToList(c, eType);
369               default -> serializeToContainer(c, eType, m.createSeq());
370            };
371         }
372      } else if (sType.isCharSequence() || sType.isChar()) {
373         n = m.createLiteral(encodeTextInvalidChars(o));
374      } else if (sType.isNumber() || sType.isBoolean()) {
375         if (!ctx.isAddLiteralTypes())
376            n = m.createLiteral(o.toString());
377         else
378            n = m.createTypedLiteral(o);
379      } else if (sType.isReader()) {
380         n = m.createLiteral(encodeTextInvalidChars(read((Reader)o, SerializerSession::handleThrown)));
381      } else if (sType.isInputStream()) {
382         n = m.createLiteral(encodeTextInvalidChars(read((InputStream)o, SerializerSession::handleThrown)));
383      } else {
384         n = m.createLiteral(encodeTextInvalidChars(toString(o)));
385      }
386
387      pop();
388      return n;
389   }
390
391   private void serializeBeanMap(BeanMap<?> m, Resource r, String typeName) throws SerializeException {
392      var l = new ArrayList<BeanPropertyValue>();
393      if (nn(typeName)) {
394         var pm = m.getMeta().getTypeProperty();
395         l.add(new BeanPropertyValue(pm, pm.getName(), typeName, null));
396      }
397      var checkNull = (Predicate<Object>)(x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x));
398      m.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> l.add(new BeanPropertyValue(pMeta, key, value, thrown)));
399      Collections.reverse(l);
400      l.forEach(x -> {
401         var bpMeta = x.getMeta();
402         var cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) bpMeta.getBeanInfo();
403         var bpRdf = getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(bpMeta);
404         var bpXml = getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(bpMeta);
405         if (bpRdf.isBeanUri())
406            return;
407         var key = x.getName();
408         var value = x.getValue();
409         var t = x.getThrown();
410         if (nn(t))
411            onBeanGetterException(bpMeta, t);
412         if (canIgnoreValue(bpMeta, key, value))
413            return;
414         var ns = bpRdf.getNamespace();
415         if (ns == null && ctx.isUseXmlNamespaces())
416            ns = bpXml.getNamespace();
417         if (ns == null)
418            ns = ctx.getJuneauBpNs();
419         else if (ctx.isAutoDetectNamespaces())
420            addModelPrefix(ns);
421         var p = model.createProperty(ns.getUri(), encodeElementName(key));
422         var n = serializeAnything(value, bpMeta.isUri(), cMeta, key, bpMeta, r);
423         if (nn(n))
424            r.addProperty(p, n);
425      });
426   }
427
428   private void serializeMap(Map m, Resource r, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
429      m = sort(m);
430      var keyType = type.getKeyType();
431      var valueType = type.getValueType();
432      var l = CollectionUtils.toList(m.entrySet());
433      Collections.reverse(l);
434      l.forEach(x -> {
435         var entry = (Map.Entry<Object,Object>)x;
436         Object value = entry.getValue();
437         Object key = generalize(entry.getKey(), keyType);
438         var ns = ctx.getJuneauBpNs();
439         var p = model.createProperty(ns.getUri(), encodeElementName(toString(key)));
440         var n = serializeAnything(value, false, valueType, toString(key), null, r);
441         if (nn(n))
442            r.addProperty(p, n);
443      });
444   }
445
446   private Container serializeToContainer(Collection c, ClassMeta<?> type, Container list) throws SerializeException {
447      var elementType = type.getElementType();
448      c.forEach(x -> list.add(serializeAnything(x, false, elementType, null, null, null)));
449      return list;
450   }
451
452   private RDFList serializeToList(Collection c, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
453      var elementType = type.getElementType();
454      List<RDFNode> l = listOfSize(c.size());
455      c.forEach(x -> l.add(serializeAnything(x, false, elementType, null, null, null)));
456      return model.createList(l.iterator());
457   }
458
459   private void serializeToMultiProperties(Collection c, ClassMeta<?> sType, BeanPropertyMeta bpm, String attrName, Resource parentResource) throws SerializeException {
460      var elementType = sType.getElementType();
461      var bpRdf = getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
462      var bpXml = getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
463      c.forEach(x -> {
464         var ns = bpRdf.getNamespace();
465         if (ns == null && ctx.isUseXmlNamespaces())
466            ns = bpXml.getNamespace();
467         if (ns == null)
468            ns = ctx.getJuneauBpNs();
469         else if (ctx.isAutoDetectNamespaces())
470            addModelPrefix(ns);
471         var n2 = serializeAnything(x, false, elementType, null, null, null);
472         var p = model.createProperty(ns.getUri(), encodeElementName(attrName));
473         parentResource.addProperty(p, n2);
474      });
475   }
476
477   @Override
478   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
479      var cm = getClassMetaForObject(o);
480      // HTT: RdfStreamSerializer.Builder only exposes language(); looseCollections is always false for stream serializers.
481      if (ctx.isLooseCollections() && nn(cm) && cm.isCollectionOrArray()) {
482         Collection c = cm.isCollection() ? (Collection)o : toList(cm.inner(), o);
483         forEachEntry(c, x -> serializeAnything(x, false, object(), "root", null, null));
484      } else {
485         var n = serializeAnything(o, false, getExpectedRootType(o), "root", null, null);
486         Resource r;
487         if (n.isLiteral()) {
488            r = model.createResource();
489            r.addProperty(pValue, n);
490         } else {
491            r = n.asResource();
492         }
493         // HTT: RdfStreamSerializer.Builder only exposes language(); addRootProp is always false.
494         if (ctx.isAddRootProp())
495            r.addProperty(pRoot, "true");
496      }
497      RDFDataMgr.write(out.getOutputStream(), model, lang);
498   }
499
500}
